summary: Completed comprehensive testing of POSx Suite new features batch. Fixed 3 bugs: MongoDB ObjectId serialization in purchase-orders and peripherals endpoints, and missing outlet_id in CashierPage hold order. All 28 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified working.

fixed.issue: MongoDB _id not excluded from response causing 500 error
MongoDB _id not excluded from response causing 500 error
Missing outlet_id in handleHoldOrder causing 422 error

login_page.register_link: PASS - 'Register new business' link visible and clickable
login_page.register_form: PASS - Shows name, business name, business type, PIN fields
login_page.keypad_login: PASS - Admin (123456), Cashier (1111), Waiter (2222) all work

features_tested.toast_notifications: PASS - Toasts appear at top-center of page

admin_users.add_user: PASS - Dialog opens with permissions checkboxes
admin_users.permissions: PASS - Admin Module and POS Module permissions visible and togglable

admin_reports.tabs: PASS - All 4 tabs present: Sales, Cost Analysis, Staff Performance, Payment Methods
admin_reports.sales_report: PASS - Shows revenue, orders, avg order value, daily sales chart
admin_reports.cost_report: PASS - API returns products, total_cost, total_revenue, total_profit
admin_reports.staff_report: PASS - API returns staff performance data
admin_reports.payment_methods_report: PASS - API returns payment methods breakdown

admin_settings.receipt_tab: PASS - Header and footer text fields with live preview
admin_settings.printers_tab: PASS - Connection Mode selector (USB/LAN/Bluetooth) in add printer dialog
admin_settings.peripherals_tab: PASS - Add peripheral with type (cash drawer, customer display, barcode scanner)

admin_purchases.create_po: PASS - Dialog with supplier, type (internal/external), items, notes
admin_purchases.po_crud: PASS - Create, update status, mark received, delete all work

admin_products.barcode_field: PASS - Barcode input field visible in add/edit dialog
admin_products.image_upload: PASS - File upload and URL input options available
admin_products.cost_markup: PASS - Cost price and markup % fields with auto-calculate sales price

cashier_hold_order.hold_button: PASS - Hold Order button visible in cart sidebar
cashier_hold_order.hold_order: PASS - Order held successfully, appears in held orders list
cashier_hold_order.load_held_order: PASS - Click held order loads it back into cart
cashier_hold_order.re_hold_order: PASS - Update items and hold again works (PUT /api/orders/{id})

waiter_hold_order.re_open_table: PASS - Re-opening table loads held order
waiter_hold_order.re_hold_order: PASS - Edit items and hold again works (PUT /api/orders/{id})

backend_apis.POST /api/register: PASS - Returns 400 for already registered business

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components - accessibility improvement needed
404 errors for some logo/image resources in Settings page - may need to check image paths
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed MongoDB _id exclusion in purchase-orders and peripherals POST endpoints
/app/frontend/src/pages/CashierPage.js - Added missing outlet_id and tax fields in handleHoldOrder
seed_data_creation: Created test peripherals, printers, purchase orders during testing - prefixed with TEST_
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from batch 1 are working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py cover registration, file upload, enhanced reports, purchase orders, peripherals, hold order bug fix, printer modes, user permissions, and receipt settings. Cashier and Waiter hold order flows both work correctly with PUT /api/orders/{id} endpoint.
